heroSlideshow.title: Premium Import Automotive Parts
heroSlideshow.description: Discover the finest selection of automotive parts engineered for performance and durability.

aboutSection.description: 77 Performance is a premium imported automotive parts brand built on a proven global manufacturing foundation, using Premium Grade A materials and supported by a business system for long-term growth.

manufacturingSection.description: We do not just assemble, we manufacture. With tens of thousands of square meters of factory facilities and precision technology, every 77 Performance component is produced under world-class manufacturing standards.

features.title: Industrial-Scale Factory
features.desc: Tens of thousands of m² of factory facilities covering production, R&D, and centralized warehousing.

features.title: Automated Assembly
features.desc: Automated robotic systems ensure precise consistency in every unit.

features.title: Precision Machining
features.desc: Advanced CNC technology for micron-level accuracy and component performance.

features.title: Multi-stage QC
features.desc: Layered inspection from raw materials to final checks before shipment.

features.title: R&D Innovation
features.desc: Continuous development for design improvement and material durability.

features.title: Global OEM Standard
features.desc: Trusted globally as OEM-equivalent replacement quality.

intro.description: Quality is not just a promise. At 77 Performance, we prioritize engineering precision and global standards.

pillars.title: Premium Materials
pillars.subtitle: Grade A Selection
pillars.desc: We do not compromise on core materials. Built with high-quality steel and Grade-A rubber components.

pillars.title: Engineered Comfort
pillars.subtitle: Precision Damping
pillars.desc: Driving comfort is not accidental. Our valving system is calibrated to absorb micro-vibrations.

pillars.title: Extreme Durability
pillars.subtitle: Built to Last
pillars.desc: Designed for long service life. Every unit undergoes high-cycle durability testing.

header.description: Our manufacturing foundation is built on quality pillars that ensure world-class precision, consistency, and durability.

integrated.title: Integrated Production Ecosystem
integrated.desc: A tens-of-thousands m² facility with integrated systems: Machining, Assembly, Surface Treatment, and Final Inspection under one roof.

experience.label: Years Experience
experience.desc: Since 2008, a stable and sustainable production track record.

globalMarket.title: Global Market
globalMarket.desc: Trusted across regions worldwide for Aftermarket and OEM Replacement markets.

quality.title: Strict Quality Control
quality.desc: Multi-stage inspection from raw materials to finished goods.

portfolio.title: Complete Portfolio
portfolio.desc: Comprehensive chassis and suspension range: Shock Absorber, Control Arm, Bushing, Ball Joint, and Rack End.

rnd.title: R&D Oriented
rnd.desc: Internal research team for continuous design and material enhancement.

brandPositioning.descriptionLead: In a market filled with quality fluctuations, we take a different path.
brandPositioning.descriptionTail: was not created merely to compete on the lowest price shelf.
brandPositioning.quote: We do not just sell parts. We build authority, consistency, and trust for the future.

points.title: Value Over Price
points.desc: Pricing that reflects Grade-A materials and R&D quality.

points.title: Global Consistency
points.desc: The first batch quality is identical to the thousandth batch.

points.title: Legacy Building
points.desc: For partners seeking business authority, not just commodity trade.

globalVision.descriptionTail: is not limited by geography. We build a product ecosystem relevant to markets across Asia, Europe, and America.

distributorBenefits.description: First in Indonesia, the only partner delivering a complete business ecosystem and end-to-end support like 77 Performance. Becoming a 77 Performance distributor means access to a mature business ecosystem. We provide 360° support from upstream to downstream.

benefits.title: Monthly Revenue Guarantee
benefits.desc: Minimum monthly revenue guarantee of IDR 100,000,000 from sales to TJM Auto Care and Raja Oto workshop networks across Indonesia.

benefits.title: Annual Order Target
benefits.desc: Target IDR 500M/month (IDR 6B/year). First year reduced to IDR 250M/month.

benefits.title: Maximum Profit Margin
benefits.desc: Up to 150% margin, special distributor discounts, and volume-based pricing.

benefits.title: Official Product Warranty
benefits.desc: 1-year national warranty and 2-year international warranty for all products.

benefits.title: Exclusive Area
benefits.desc: One distributor per city/territory. No dual distributors in the same area.

benefits.title: Product Training
benefits.desc: Official online/offline product knowledge training and latest technology updates.

benefits.title: Free Premium Website
benefits.desc: Dedicated distributor website for branding (e.g. www.7performancejogja.com).

benefits.title: Corporate Legal Assistance
benefits.desc: Access to legal team and third-party debt recovery support for overdue receivables.

benefits.title: National Celebrity Promotion
benefits.desc: Free promotion by Zack Lee plus ready-to-publish content to support partner workshops/stores.

benefits.title: Complete Promotion Package
benefits.desc: Marketing kit: banners, display racks, product modules, and physical brochures.

benefits.title: Modern Stock System
benefits.desc: Stock management, custom barcode, and real-time live pricelist updates.

benefits.title: Store Display Package
benefits.desc: One TV display set + promotional and educational videos ready for store playback.

benefits.title: Emergency Support
benefits.desc: Fast-response central team access for urgent stock, claims, and technical issues.

benefits.title: Principal Referral
benefits.desc: Direct workshop and store referrals from central principal to area distributors.

benefits.title: Free Nationwide Shipping
benefits.desc: Free shipping in Greater Jakarta + nationwide subsidy (minimum order IDR 400M).

benefits.title: Ready Marketing Content
benefits.desc: Full kit: product photos, cinematic videos, ready-to-post branding assets.

bonus.title: Annual Revenue Bonus
bonus.desc: Exclusive rewards (cash/display unit) based on revenue achievement and consistency.

bonus.title: Early Stock Priority
bonus.desc: Early access to new products and stock availability priority before general market release.

promotionStrategy.description: Building partner trust through complementary product strategies that add tangible value to every transaction.

mainPromo.subtitle: Main Program
mainPromo.title: Buy Shockbreaker / Racksteer
mainPromo.desc: Every purchase of Shockbreaker and/or Racksteer units from 77 Performance gets an instant Trisev Buffer Suspension bonus. Improve comfort and stability at no extra cost.

additionalPrograms.title: Free Digital Assets
additionalPrograms.desc: Access ready-to-post HD photos, posters, and official social media content.

additionalPrograms.title: Zack Lee Endorsement Video
additionalPrograms.desc: Exclusive promotional video for workshops and stores directly by Zack Lee.

additionalPrograms.title: Demo Video Access
additionalPrograms.desc: Official product education and installation demo videos to support closing.

additionalPrograms.title: 30% Product Discount
additionalPrograms.desc: Up to 30% off selected items during promo periods.

additionalPrograms.title: Bundling Package Price
additionalPrograms.desc: Special pricing for bundle purchases with attractive profit margins.

additionalPrograms.title: Nationwide Free Shipping
additionalPrograms.desc: Free delivery cost for promo purchases across Indonesia.

additionalPrograms.title: Priority Delivery
additionalPrograms.desc: Promo orders receive priority packing and dispatch lanes.

additionalPrograms.title: Early Promo Access
additionalPrograms.desc: Get earlier access to product launches and promo programs than the market.

additionalPrograms.title: 10% Off Official Store
additionalPrograms.desc: Get 10% discount for every purchase through the official store.

memberCommunity.description: More than buying and selling. Join an ecosystem that drives sustainable business growth.

benefits.title: Exclusive Member Group
benefits.desc: Access to a private community of workshop and store entrepreneurs.

benefits.title: Faster Promo Updates
benefits.desc: Be the first to know about new products and campaigns.

benefits.title: Training & Education Info
benefits.desc: Technical materials and business strategies to level up your team skills.

benefits.title: Nationwide Networking
benefits.desc: Broad connections across workshop networks throughout Indonesia.

benefits.title: Event & Campaign Invitations
benefits.desc: Priority invitations for exhibitions and 77 Performance events.

benefits.title: Partner Workshop Vouchers
benefits.desc: Special promo voucher incentives for partners.

memberCommunity.footerQuote: This community creates a repeat ecosystem, not one-time sales.

realDifference.bgText: High Performance Standard High Performance Standard

comparisons.label: Pricing Strategy
comparisons.us: Focus on Value and Business Growth

distributorQualification.quote: Building the automotive future with uncompromising professional standards.

requirements.title: Official Company Legality
requirements.desc: Provide responsible person ID, tax number, legal entity documents, and operational warehouse.

requirements.title: Active Automotive Background
requirements.desc: Have active experience or network in the automotive sector (workshop/store/community).

requirements.title: Territory Target Commitment
requirements.desc: Ready to meet sales targets according to principal-defined territories.

requirements.title: Mandatory Product Training
requirements.desc: Pass official product knowledge training as distributor activation requirement.

requirements.title: Network Development Capability
requirements.desc: Able to manage sales chains (partner workshops) in each territory.

requirements.title: Principal System Compliance
requirements.desc: Must follow official pricing standards and 77 Performance policies.

requirements.title: Operational Responsibility
requirements.desc: All operational and HR costs are the distributor's responsibility.

requirements.title: Brand Reputation Commitment
requirements.desc: Maintain professional 77 Performance brand image in the operational region.

limitedOpportunity.optionAText: If you only want to sell,
limitedOpportunity.optionASubtext: there are plenty of choices out there.

finalCta.description: Become the sole distributor in your city. Do not let competitors take the golden opportunity inside the 77 Performance ecosystem.
